complaint: I am writing to report a very serious issue with my account. Yesterday at approximately 2:30 PM I was trying to send money to my brother who lives in Dhaka. His number is 01712345678. I entered the amount of 10000 taka and pressed send. The app showed a loading screen for about 30 seconds and then showed an error message saying Transaction Failed. However when I checked my balance the 10000 taka was already deducted. I tried calling helpline but could not get through. Tried chat support but no one responded. This is for my brother medical treatment. He needs it today. I have screenshots of the error. Please help resolve this urgently. I have been a loyal customer for 5 years.
